docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2017, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITIONER PRESENT IN COURT. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE.
